indications.text: NAFTIN® Cream is indicated for the treatment of interdigital tinea pedis, tinea cruris, and tinea corporis caused by the organism Trichophyton rubrum.

NAFTIN Gel is an allylamine antifungal indicated for the treatment of interdigital tinea pedis caused by the organisms Trichophyton rubrum, Trichophyton
mentagrophytes, and Epidermophyton floccosum.

NAFTIN (naftifine hydrochloride) Gel, 2% is an allylamine antifungal indicated for the treatment of interdigital tinea pedis caused by the organisms Trichophyton
rubrum, Trichophyton mentagrophytes, and Epidermophyton floccosum in patients 18 years of age and older.

NAFTIN® Gel is indicated for the treatment of interdigital tinea pedis caused by the organisms Trichophyton rubrum, Trichophyton mentagrophytes, and
Epidermophyton floccosum.
